_README: Expected values are PSD truth (from tools/psd-spec.json); font-sizes are the rendered psd-px values to <=2 decimal places (relaxed from 0-dp — see BUILD-SPEC §3; individual values may be eyeball-corrected against the PNG, which outranks psd-spec) and audited with a ±0.1px tolerance — otherwise DO NOT change them. Selectors map to the real elements in the ROOT non-responsive build (index.html on main). page=the build being audited; viewport_width is irrelevant to font-size/weight/colour in this fixed-width build. Elements rendered as a raster image or an inline SVG have no auditable computed FONT, so they live in the top-level '_visual_only' array and are verified by eye against bazinger.png instead (the raster logo additionally gets a dimensional height check in 'checks'). Selectors prefixed '.todo-unbuilt' point at sections not yet built in this build (testimonials); they intentionally report MISSING and form the remaining build/mapping TODO list. '_psd_font' = the @font-face the element must use.

checks.label: Header — Aavailable on :
checks._note: computed font-size 18.1px; parent .ptwo has transform scaleX/Y(0.94) so the VISUAL size is ~17px (the audit reads the un-transformed computed value). Eyeball-tuned vs PNG.

checks.label: Header — DOWNLOAD
checks._note: font-size 14.3px is a DevTools eyeball-correction vs the PNG (psd-spec ~14; Lato-Bold 15 true) -- within the audit's 0.1px tolerance. NB: button_two (LEARN MORE) is still 14px; bump it to match if you re-tune it.

checks.label: Header — HOME Features Gallery Video
checks._note: font-size 12.4px is eyeball-corrected vs the PNG (psd-spec 12; ≈ true 13×0.9489=12.34) — with the scaleY(0.9) squash on .menu li a it reads truest; nav menu-band heatmap red dropped 3130->1560. See BUILD-SPEC §7/§2.

checks.label: Header — LEARN MORE
checks._note: font-size 14.18px is a DevTools eyeball-correction vs the PNG (psd-spec ~14; Lato-Bold 15 true) -- within the audit's 0.1px tolerance. button_one (DOWNLOAD) is independently tuned to 14.3px.

checks.label: Header — Simple, Beautiful and Amazing
checks._note: font-size 45.55 is hand-tuned vs the PNG (psd-spec run = 45.5 true); mirrored here per the ≤2-dp policy.

checks.label: Header — and Amazing (bold emphasis span)
checks._note: The hero heading's 2nd run ('and Amazing') is bold (psd-spec). Size/color inherit from .banner_content h1; only the weight/face differ. Added to lock the bold emphasis the audit previously didn't cover.

checks.label: Header — bazinger (logo image height)
checks._note: Wordmark is a raster logo.png; psd-spec height is 50px (130x50 psd-px, was 137x52 true-px) but 48.5px reads truest vs the PNG (eyeball-corrected; logo-band heatmap red 667->117) — plus transform scale(1.01), which is visual-only and does not change computed height. Typography is unauditable and lives in _visual_only; this check verifies the rendered image height. See BUILD-SPEC §7/§2.

_visual_only.label: Header — bazinger

_visual_only._reason: The gallery '+' is now an inline SVG (Font Awesome removed) — there is no icon-font glyph to audit. Verified visually against bazinger.png.
